❝ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴏᴡɴ sᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ.❞

UPDATE/CONTEXT

I’ve been pretty slow on requests lately, but I’ll try and get some done within the next week or two! I try to only post/make bots when I feel like it otherwise I get burnt out super easily. Thank you guys for all your support and love. Let me know how you like him! 🫶

P.S.

I tried out this bot before I posted it, and let me tell you... I love him. JLLM works surprisingly well with this new personality format, so I’ll probably keep it. Hope you all enjoy him as much as I will!!!
